mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_id as id, m.menu_name as name, m.menu_remark as remark, m.menu_type as type, m.menu_url as url, m.menu_icon as icon, m.pid FROM tb_menu m JOIN role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.menu_id
SELECT menu_id as id, menu_name as name, menu_remark as remark, menu_type as type, menu_url as url, menu_icon as icon, pid FROM tb_menu ORDER BY menu_id
